name: Cherry Oat Dessert Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 can Wilderness cherry pie filling (21 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar, nuts, oats, margarine, and flour until crumbly. Set aside.
3. Press the remaining mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch square baking dish.
4. Stir cinnamon into the cherry filling.
5. Spread the cherry filling over the crust.
6. Sprinkle reserved crumbs over the top and press lightly.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until lightly browned. Cool. Cut into squares.
